sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n91457" key="puktei=on" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πυκτ-εῖον</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n91457.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">boxing-ring</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Suid.</author> </bibl> </sense> <sense n="II" id="n91457.1" level="2" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> (<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">Πυκτός</foreign> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">πτυκτός</ref> </xr>) <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">book-case</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Zonar.</author> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
